scene_1.visual_plan: Open with a medium close-up of the model sitting in a cozy, softly lit bathroom area with natural sunlight coming through a window, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The camera is on a tripod with a slow, smooth push-in to intensify engagement. Depth of field is shallow, clearly focusing on the model’s face while gently blurring the background to keep attention on her expressions. The model looks steadily into the camera, maintaining a natural and sincere tone throughout. Midway through the scene, she lifts the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo bottle with her right hand, holding it near her face for clear product visibility. Pause briefly on a cut to a close-up of the bottle label before returning to the model’s face for the finishing lines.
scene_1.dialogue: I wish I knew this before trying to cover my gray hair with messy dyes. I struggled for years until I found KYOGOKU Color Shampoo、これだけで白髪が自然にカバーできて、しかもリンゴ幹細胞やヒアルロン酸の天然成分が髪と頭皮をしっかりケアしてくれるんです。今では髪が健康的でツヤツヤになって、洗うたびに花園のような香りに包まれて癒されています。
